arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella reveals turning point in Chelsea career
arts.sum: Asked to identify the turning point in his career, Cucurella confessed three months on the sidelines with an ankle injury last season gave him the chance to really get his head around what was going on. Marc Cucurella has admitted time on the sidelines with an ankle injury helped him turn his Chelsea career around.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye Cambiaso as Carvajal replacement: Player and Juventus stance revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have set their sights on Juventus defender Andrea Cambiaso as a potential replacement for the injured Dani Carvajal, according to reports from Tuttosport (via IlBianconero). The Spanish giants have been impressed by Cambiaso’s recent performances, particularly his showing for Italy against Belgium, which has further cemented his status as a key player for both Juventus and the national team. Cambiaso’s rise to prominence has not gone unnoticed across Europe, with several clubs expressing interest in the versatile fullback during the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella takes bizarre dig at Cole Palmer and reveals his Chelsea team-mate's one flaw
arts.sum: Chelsea star Marc Cucrella took a cheeky swipe at superstar teammate Cole Palmer over his appearance but believes England international is destined to 'be among the best'.

arts.ttl: Spain vs Denmark: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: European champions Spain continue their 2024/25 UEFA Nations League campaign on Saturday evening when they host Denmark. Spain have a whole host of their Euro 2024-winning squad unavailable to them, including Rodri, Dani Carvajal, Dani Olmo and Nico Williams who all miss out through injury.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal ‘touched by the wand of God’, says Spain boss

arts.ttl: Spain boss: Clubs' responsibility to rest players
arts.sum: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente says the onus should be on clubs to rest players, not national teams, amid an increase in injuries across European football.
